tagline: How May We Be of Service?

hero.headline: Tomball's Trusted Pool Experts Since 2004
hero.subheadline: Your pool deserves more than guesswork. With over 20 years of hands-on experience, Peerless Pool Service delivers honest repairs, expert remodels, and equipment upgrades that keep your backyard in peak condition. No pressure, no upselling — just straight answers and quality work.

services.label: Our Expertise
services.headline: Complete Pool & Spa Solutions<br class="hidden md:block"> Under One Roof
services.subtitle: From equipment breakdowns to full remodels, Peerless handles every aspect of pool and spa care with 20+ years of technical know-how and a commitment to doing it right the first time.

cards.title: Full Pool & Spa Remodels
cards.description: Turnkey remodeling from outdated or damaged pools to stunning backyard retreats. Resurfacing, tile, coping, and full structural overhauls — handled start to finish.

cards.title: Equipment Upgrades & Repairs
cards.description: Salt systems, pumps, filters, heaters, lights, controllers, and more. Licensed technicians diagnose fast and repair right — most jobs completed same visit.

cards.title: Filter Cleans
cards.description: Professional DE and cartridge filter cleaning recommended 2-4 times per year. Keeps your system running efficiently and your water crystal clear all season long.

cards.title: Drain & Cleans
cards.description: Expert pool draining and thorough wall cleaning by professionals who know how to avoid the costly structural damage that comes with improper drainage.

cards.title: Salt System Installation
cards.description: Switch to a salt chlorine generator for softer water, lower maintenance, and no more hauling chlorine. Full installation and ongoing maintenance included.

cards.title: Pool Automation
cards.description: Modern controllers that let you manage pumps, lights, heaters, and water features from one panel or your phone. Simplify your pool life with smart automation.

steps.title: Schedule Your Inspection
steps.description: Call or fill out the form. We'll come out, inspect your pool and equipment, and walk you through exactly what we find — no jargon, no pressure.

steps.title: Get an Honest Estimate
steps.description: Chris and the team will explain every option, shop the best parts, and send you a transparent quote with no hidden fees. You decide what makes sense for your budget.

steps.title: We Get It Done Right
steps.description: Our licensed crew handles the work professionally and on schedule. You'll receive a detailed service report, and we stand behind every job we complete.

about.label: Why Tomball Trusts Peerless
about.headline: 20+ Years of Doing Pool Service the Right Way
about.description: Peerless Pool Service was founded in 2004 by Chris, a hands-on pool professional who believed homeowners deserved better than the runaround. Based right here in Tomball, TX, we've built our reputation one honest repair and one satisfied customer at a time. Every technician on our team shares the same philosophy: explain the problem, present fair options, and do the job right. We're not here to upsell you — we're here to earn your trust.

features.title: Licensed, Insured & Screened
features.description: Every job is backed by proper licensing, full insurance, and HomeAdvisor screening. Your home and property are in safe hands.

features.title: No Upselling. Honest Answers.
features.description: We explain what needs fixing and why. You get transparent pricing with real options — never pressured into work you don't need.

features.title: Detailed Service Reports
features.description: After every visit, you receive a thorough report showing exactly what was done, what was found, and what to watch for next.

pricing.headline: Transparent Pricing. No Surprises.
pricing.subtitle: Every estimate is upfront and detailed. We shop parts for the best value and never add hidden fees — because honest work shouldn't come with a catch.

guarantee.headline: Our "Peerless Promise" Guarantee
guarantee.description: If any repair or service doesn't meet your expectations, we come back and make it right at no extra charge. With 20+ years in the business, our reputation is everything — and we protect it by treating every pool like it's our own. That's the Peerless difference.

faqs.question: How quickly can you come out for an inspection?
faqs.answer: Most inspections are scheduled within a few business days. For urgent equipment failures, call us directly and we'll do our best to get there fast. We know a broken pool heater or pump can't wait.

faqs.question: Do you handle both residential and commercial pools?
faqs.answer: Yes. We service residential pools and spas as well as commercial properties. Whether it's a backyard pool or a community facility, our team has the expertise and licensing to handle the job.

faqs.question: What brands of equipment do you work on?
faqs.answer: We work on all major brands — Pentair, Hayward, Jandy, Zodiac, Polaris, and more. From pumps and filters to salt systems and automation controllers, we have experience across the board.

faqs.question: Will you try to upsell me on things I don't need?
faqs.answer: Absolutely not. Our approach is straightforward: we inspect, explain what we find, and present options at different price points. You decide what makes sense. No pressure, no games — that's how Chris has run this company since 2004.

faqs.question: What areas do you serve?
faqs.answer: We're based in Tomball, TX and serve Spring, The Woodlands, Magnolia, Cypress, Klein, Champions, Northwest Houston, and surrounding Harris and Montgomery County communities.

testimonials.name: Chris M.
testimonials.text: No pressure, no up-selling; all technical knowledge and ability combined with honest customer service. Chris inspected our pool equipment, showed us what needed to be done and explained why. By day's end he'd shopped the needed parts and sent options with very reasonable cost estimates.

testimonials.name: Tomball Homeowner
testimonials.text: Excellent and on time service. Great communication and fair pricing. Peerless was hired and delivered top-notch equipment repairs, replacement, and cleaning. Highly recommend.

testimonials.name: Local Customer
testimonials.text: Been using Peerless for 7 months and love their detailed report and they show up on time. Also his company is local here in Tomball. Would not use anyone else for my pool needs.

contact.headline:

contact.subtitle: Get a free, honest estimate from a team with 20+ years of experience. No contracts, no pressure — just straightforward answers and quality pool care.
